name: John Thorne's Macaroni & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into bits
1 teaspoon dry mustard, dissolved in 1 tsp water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Boil the macaroni in salted water until just barely done, then drain and toss with the butter in a large, ovenproof mixing bowl.
3. Mix Tabasco into the evaporated milk. Reserve about 1/3 cup; stir most of the milk into the macaroni, then add 3/4 of the cheese, eggs, and mustard.
4. When well combined, season to taste with salt and pepper. Place the bowl in the oven.
5. Every five minutes, remove the bowl briefly to stir in some reserved cheese, adding more evaporated milk as needed to keep the mixture moist and smooth.
6. Continue until all the cheese is incorporated and the mixture is hot and creamy (about 20 minutes total). Serve immediately with a plate of toasted common crackers for crumbling.
